name: Spirit Bulb (Major)
description:
Activate (2 Actions) (concentrate, manipulate)

This magical bulb is harvested from an ancient grove rich in primal plant magic. When you activate the bulb, you either eat it to have it cast a 7th-rank Plant Form spell affecting you, or plant it in the ground next to you to have it cast a 7th-rank Summon Plant or Fungus spell. If you choose the summoning option, the plant or fungus appears where you planted the bulb, and you can Sustain the activation to keep control of the creature.
